title: Aman
tagline: Atmospheric photography, composed restraint. Refresh tightens scale and section padding without breaking the soulful tone.

direction.phrase: Brand-faithful refresh of aman.com home for presales — three variants with distinct compositional theses.
movements: scale: tightened to modular ratio inside captured pixel range

originalCritique: The live site is already exceptional in tone, but it carries a few token-level weaknesses that compound: scale isn't modular, photo-radius and card-radius mismatch, section padding inflates beyond the brand's actual register. The composition is calibrated; the system underneath isn't. The result is a homepage that feels right-but-tired — the kind of fatigue brand teams describe after 2–5 years untouched.

variants.name: Conservative refresh
variants.thesis: Same IA, same section order. Refined scale (modular), aligned radii, balanced section padding (64–80px), motif precision. The system the brand always had behind the composition.
variants.fix: Same IA, same section order. Token system rebuilt under the captured composition: scale snaps to a modular ratio in the brand's existing pixel range; photo and card radii align; section padding balances at 64–80px desktop. The brand's existing motifs — golden-hour tonality, atmospheric portraiture, single-people-in-environments — finally have a system that doesn't argue with them.

variants.name: Compositional shift
variants.thesis: "Travel agency brochure" — the captured destinations IA reorganises around a single composed itinerary moment. Same palette, type, photography. Different homepage thesis.
variants.fix: Same palette, type, photography. Different homepage thesis: a single composed itinerary moment leads, not the destination grid. The captured "destinations" IA recedes to a secondary surface. The brochure register lets one place be hero — water at dawn, the architectural interior at dusk — and the rest of the page is footnote, not menu.

variants.name: Bold direction
variants.thesis: Photogram-craft pushed: full-bleed photographic moments, captured cream as the sole non-photo surface, type set in the photographic register (hairline display, generous tracking).
variants.fix: Photogram-craft pushed. Full-bleed photographic moments replace card-bordered tiles. Captured cream is the sole non-photo surface; everything else is image. Display type sets in the photographic register — hairline weights, generous tracking — and Whitney SSm carries body, restrained. The page reads as photography first, copy second.

variants.name: v2 · Faithful refresh
variants.thesis: Apply the five identified improvements: hierarchy of scale (hero h2 from 31px to display), uncrop the experience photography from 326px squares, eight "Discover more" CTAs become action-specific verbs, hero gets contrast support, repetitive card composition gets rhythm changes.
variants.fix: Apply five identified improvements exactly. Hero h2 lifts from 31px (only ~2.2× body) to a real display moment. Resort photography uncrops from 326×326 thumbnails. Eight repeating "Discover more" CTAs become action-specific verbs. Hero gets contrast support so the headline doesn't drop below WCAG AA on bright frames. The eight near-identical card compositions get rhythm — breakaways, scale changes, rest.

variants.name: v2 · Place-led
variants.thesis: The brand IS the named index of places. New "36 places, 20 countries" typographic strip after the hero; hotels-feature becomes a single full-bleed image; experience eyebrows become places (Java, Argolid, NY) instead of categories; world-of-aman becomes a horizontal-scroll filmstrip.
variants.fix: The brand IS the named index of places. A new "36 places, 20 countries" typographic strip lands after the hero. Hotels-feature collapses to a single full-bleed image instead of an asymmetric pair. Experience eyebrows shift from categories (Coastal, Nature, City) to places (Java, Argolid, NY). The world-of-aman becomes a horizontal-scroll filmstrip. The page reads as a place-index first, a service taxonomy second.

variants.name: v2 · Story-led
variants.thesis: The home as chaptered editorial. Three long-form story spreads replace the categorical experiences grid; hotels-feature folds into Chapter 01; world-of-aman shrinks to a single inline strip; place-index demoted to compact roll-call near the footer. Vocabulary register: "Chapter / Read the chapter."
variants.fix: The home as chaptered editorial. Three long-form story spreads (alternating left/right composition) replace the 5-up experiences grid. Hotels-feature folds into Chapter 01. World-of-aman shrinks to a single inline strip; the place-index becomes a compact roll-call near the footer. Vocabulary shifts to "Chapter / Read the chapter." Aman publishes editorial under /stories/* — the home finally composes like that.
